title: Desktop Kitchen — Restaurant POS for QSR & Fast-Casual
description: Desktop Kitchen is a modern point-of-sale system built for quick-service and fast-casual restaurants. POS, kitchen display, delivery intelligence, inventory, loyalty, and AI — all in one platform.
ogDescription: Modern POS for QSR & fast-casual restaurants. POS, kitchen display, delivery, inventory, loyalty, and AI intelligence.
ogTitle: Desktop Kitchen — Your Kitchen. Your Rules.
twitterDescription: Modern POS for QSR & fast-casual restaurants. Start your free trial today.
heroSub: The all-in-one POS platform built for quick-service and fast-casual restaurants.
featuresSub: Six powerful modules. One platform. Zero friction.
feature1Desc: Fast, intuitive ordering with modifiers, combos, split payments, and Stripe integration. Built for speed at the counter.
feature2Desc: Real-time order flow from counter to kitchen. Track prep times, manage stations, and never lose a ticket.
feature3Desc: Manage Uber Eats, Rappi, and DiDi from one screen. Per-platform markup rules, virtual brands, and P&L analytics.
feature4Desc: Track stock levels, set low-stock alerts, manage vendors and purchase orders. Know exactly what you have.
feature5Desc: Stamp cards, SMS campaigns, and customer profiles. Turn first-time visitors into regulars automatically.
feature6Desc: Smart upsell suggestions, dynamic pricing, combo recommendations, and shrinkage detection — powered by real-time data.
howSub: Three steps. No hardware. No contracts.
howStep1Desc: Create your account and get instant access. No credit card required for your 14-day trial.
howStep2Desc: Add your menu, upload your logo, set your brand colors. Your POS looks like your restaurant.
howStep3Desc: Take orders, track inventory, and grow your business from day one. Works on any device with a browser.
pricingSub: No hidden fees. No long-term contracts. Cancel anytime.
ctaHeadline: READY TO RUN YOUR KITCHEN YOUR WAY?
ctaSub: Join restaurants already using Desktop Kitchen to streamline operations and grow revenue.
